title: Random Looting
description: All loot tables are messed up by this mod. You may be able to get a wheat seed after killing a wither, or get diamonds after breaking oak logs. Can you still beat the game?
body:
# Description

All loot tables are messed up by this mod.

You may be able to get a wheat seed after killing a wither, or get diamonds after breaking oak logs.

Can you still beat the game?

With this mod, you can fool your friends, make the game harder and more hilarious (maybe especially in live streams or modpacks?), and do whatever you want!

# Commands

Reshuffle all loot tables (with given salt):

```
/rl reshuffle [<salt>]
```

Make all loot tables back to normal:
```
/rl revoke
```

# Other functions

You can make your server reshuffle the recipes every X seconds, and set the whitelist of recipe types or recipes ID by editing the config.
